feedItems.description: allocated £8.2m to Environment & Streets (≈£56 per resident)
allocated £3.6m to Council Running Costs (≈£25 per resident)

allocated £2.5m to Culture & Leisure (≈£17 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £72 (3.4%) to £2187
